span.p:
Single dispatcher pattern (D2):
every action surface (menu, quick action,
user-menu, AI button, notification, etc.)
funnels through this one event so the
shell has ONE switch, not N (output)s.

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p: Host owns the tenant flush + reload.\nspec D10 mandates the order:\nlog → flush stores → write cookie → reload.
